name: Closing Passes
description: Mountain passes and critical routes are closing permanently due to structural collapse or seasonal change, shrinking the overworld and isolating settlements.

events.name: First Pass Closes
events.description: A major mountain pass has collapsed. An alternate route exists, but it is longer and more dangerous.

events.name: Second Pass Closes
events.description: Another critical route is gone. Settlements on the far side are becoming isolated.

events.name: Final Pass Closes
events.description: The last reliable pass is impassable. The overworld has shrunk to a fraction of its former size.
